case_title: BENJAMIN LEUTERIO VS. XIAO YEN HUANG

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LEUTERIO, BENJAMIN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY LEUTERIO, BENJAMIN
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,804.11 AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY THE DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN
ORDER (SC-225) ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS; THE COURT ORDERS: THE PAYMENT ORDER REFERRED TO IN A.[X] IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUTERIO, BENJAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $92.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,092.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN HEARING SET FOR AUG-06-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $620.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $113.48 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY LEUTERIO, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY XIAO YEN HUANG IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---DOROTHY WONG. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-223) DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUTERIO, BENJAMIN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUTERIO, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2015 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW APPEARED IN COURT TODAY TO ASSIST DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM:QUEENA HO. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE:$40.00) SERVED APR-24-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2015 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT TO JUL-15-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO CANTONESE INTEPRETER WAS AVAILABLE FOR TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUTERIO, BENJAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUTERIO, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, XIAO YEN

IT HAS BEEN DETERMINED THAT THE ENTRY OF 8/26/16 SHOULD HAVE SHOWN THAT THE WRIT WAS FULLY SATISFIED. AMOUNT COLLECTED ON WRIT FOR $2,804.11 WAS $2,803.31 LEAVING A DIFFERENCE OF 80 CENTS WHICH IS WITHIN THE COURT'S TOLERANCE LEVEL FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
